title: World Interpolation Generation Pipeline

sub_steps: get_video_batch(model, prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) → raw_data_batch, state_shape
Compute H, W from state_shape × spatial_compression_factor
Compute num_frame_pairs from input (default: num_frames // frame_stride)
LOOP: for frame_index in range(frame_index_start, num_frame_pairs):
│    └─ get_condition_latent(model, image_or_video_path, num_input_frames, state_shape, frame_index, frame_stride) → condition_latent
│    └─ generate_video_from_batch_with_loop(model, data_batch, condition_latent, num_of_loops, guidance, state_shape, num_steps, seed, ...) → video_np_THWC
└─ Accumulate segment: skip first frame if not first iteration (avoid duplication)
torch.cat(video_output, dim=1) → video_tensor (C, total_T, H, W)
Permute + normalize → video_np (T, H, W, C) uint8

if_false: if video is None: RETURN None (blocked)

key_methods._load_prompt_upsampler_model: Loads VLM (Pixtral-12B) via create_vlm_prompt_upsampler(); stores as self.prompt_upsampler
key_methods._run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt(image_or: Uses VLM to generate enhanced prompt from visual input: prepare_dialog() + run_chat_completion_vlm(max_gen_len=400)
key_methods._run_tokenizer_encoding(image_or_video_p: Calls get_condition_latent() with frame_index and frame_stride for interpolation pair selection
key_methods._run_model(condition_latent, negative_pr: Calls generate_video_from_batch_with_loop() for diffusion sampling; returns video_np_THWC
key_methods._run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding: Orchestrates per-frame-pair tokenizer encoding + diffusion inference loop; concatenates output segments
key_methods.generate(prompt, image_or_video_path, ne: Top-level pipeline: upsampler → guardrail → text embedding → model → guardrail → return

key_differences_from_parent: Prompt upsampler is VLM-based (visual input), not text-only (uses prepare_dialog + run_chat_completion_vlm)
_run_model_with_offload loops over frame pairs (frame_index_start to num_frame_pairs) for multi-segment interpolation
_run_tokenizer_encoding accepts frame_index and frame_stride for interpolation pair targeting
Output concatenation handles overlap: first frame of subsequent segments is skipped
generate() checks if prompt is None and upsampler disabled → accepts visual-only input
external_dependencies: get_condition_latent (inference_utils) — tokenizer encoding per frame pair
important_notes: Interpolator pipeline processes multiple frame pairs sequentially in a loop. Each pair: encode boundary frames → diffusion sample → append segment. Offloading flags control GPU memory management by loading/unloading components between steps. Guardrail runs twice: once on (upsampled) prompt, once on generated video. VLM upsampler takes visual input (not text), making prompt optional when upsampler is enabled.
